MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Sergei Bokov.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Linell Brandon is present.
Attorney Teecia Kimura representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of July-09-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
